sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56842" key="kerdofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερδοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n56842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing gain</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
